title: Decision Flow for Applying the Rule of Sum vs. Rule of Product
description: A flowchart to help decide whether to use the Rule of Sum (for mutually exclusive choices) or the Rule of Product (for sequential choices) when counting possibilities.
relationships: Start with 'Task to perform', then decide if choices are 'Mutually Exclusive Choices (OR)' or 'Sequential Steps (AND)'. If OR, apply 'Rule of Sum' to get 'Final Count'. If AND, apply 'Rule of Product' to get 'Final Count'.
